milestones.title: Project kickoff — planning started
milestones.notes: Day we started organizing.

milestones.title: Venue locked — Tomer's place (pool + outdoor kitchen)
milestones.notes: No cost.

milestones.title: Theme decided — D&D
milestones.notes: Dungeons & Dragons.

milestones.title: Format decided — joint mixed party
milestones.notes: Full transparency with couple.

milestones.title: Budget model set — ₪50/person cap
milestones.notes: One-time ask; Dror & Bal cover the rest.

milestones.title: Guest list drafted (28) in Google Sheets
milestones.notes: Lives in Google Sheets.

milestones.title: Activities confirmed — pool, pool table, trivia, playlist
Food must-haves locked — fries + cocktail station
milestones.notes: Non-negotiable.

milestones.title: Drinks plan — home-brew keg + 2 potion dispensers
milestones.notes: Mana Potion (blue) + Healing Potion (red).

milestones.title: 🍺 BREW THE KEG — must start TODAY July 4!
milestones.notes: 14 days to party. brewing_plan.md created with US-05 quick-turn recipe (ferment 10d + carbonate 4d). MUST happen TODAY.

milestones.title: Follow up with Ido on pizza quote
milestones.notes: 10 trays (1 vegan), pizza shop in Maccabim. ⛔ Gates the BBQ-vs-pizza decision and food order (due July 6).

milestones.title: 📨 SEND INVITES — overdue 19 days!
milestones.notes: 28 guests need to know date/location. Manual invite via WhatsApp/text. Include vital info.

milestones.title: Identify & flag vegan guest in list
milestones.notes: Needed before food order — confirm who the vegan guest is.

milestones.title: Decide BBQ vs. pizza
milestones.notes: ⛔ Waiting on Ido's pizza quote to make decision. Food order due July 6.

milestones.title: Confirm payment model (Paybox / pay-what-you-want)
milestones.notes: Bal's call — she had a bad experience with money asks. Stay within ₪50/person cap.

milestones.title: Confirm trivia contact & availability for July 18
milestones.notes: Bal's contact — need name and confirmation they're available July 18.

milestones.title: Decide cocktail: pre-bought vs. custom-made
milestones.notes: Pre-bought ₪100/500ml (Spicehaus) vs. custom made (Tomer estimate).

milestones.title: Finalize cocktail recipes + who mans the station
milestones.notes: Mana Potion (blue) + Healing Potion (red) recipes.

milestones.title: Decide D&D decorations to buy
milestones.notes: Review decorations_suggestions.md. Online orders need shipping lead time.

milestones.title: Seating check — chairs/tables for 28
milestones.notes: Rent if short (~₪300 tables, ~₪200 chairs). Update equipment_list.md.

milestones.title: Place online decoration orders
milestones.notes: Needs decor-decide first. Allow 1-2 weeks shipping.

milestones.title: Estimate cocktail quantities (2 dispensers, 28 ppl)
milestones.notes: ~15-20L total, 7.5-10L per dispenser. Update budget.

milestones.title: Estimate french fry quantity (~30 ppl)
milestones.notes: ~3-4kg frozen fries for 28 people. Confirm with food order.

milestones.title: Confirm keg tap, stand & cooling gear
milestones.notes: Need right tap for keg type + ice bucket/stand to keep cold during party.

milestones.title: Place food order (pizza/BBQ supplies)
milestones.notes: After BBQ-vs-pizza decision. Confirm vegan option.

milestones.title: Start collecting ₪50/person from guests
milestones.notes: Method per payment-model decision (Bit / transfer / Paybox).

milestones.title: Confirm pool table set up & accessible
milestones.notes: Balls, cues, chalk in good shape.

milestones.title: Buy pool setup gear (inflatables, games, towels)
milestones.notes: AliExpress order arriving — confirm contents. Towels TBD.

milestones.title: Decide cleanup plan (DIY vs. hire)
milestones.notes: ✅ DECIDED: hire cleaners — ₪300, pay after party.

milestones.title: Buy non-perishables (disposables, decor, amenities)
milestones.notes: Cups, plates, napkins, sunscreen, bug spray, etc.

milestones.title: Send guests parking / transport + arrival info
milestones.notes: Guests arrange own (Waze/Uber). Combine with invite or send separately.

milestones.title: Buy ice (large quantity)
milestones.notes: Coolers, keg, drinks — think big.

milestones.title: Setup day — decorate, set stations, chill keg & drinks
milestones.notes: Day before. Tap keg cold, fill dispensers prep.

milestones.title: 🎉 PARTY DAY
milestones.notes: Dror & Bal's bachelor/ette bash at Tomer's place!
